topic: A person changing a flat tire on a car.

parsed_generation.script: VEO 3 Shot — 8s: A person changes a flat tire on a car in a three-panel frame; left panel shows loosening lug nuts with a wrench, center panel shows the jack lifting the car, right panel shows the flat tire removed and the spare ready to mount.
parsed_generation.narration: The person loosens lug nuts with a wrench, the car is lifted by a jack, the flat tire is removed, and a spare tire is readied to mount.

feedback: The output meets the topic and sequence but could better align with the reference style. Specify per-panel camera angles and shot types (e.g., left panel: close-up of lug nuts; center panel: low-angle jack shot) to enhance visual specificity. Consider enriching narration with context beyond the obvious actions (e.g., safety steps or timing cues) and use per-panel labels rather than generic left/center/right to mirror the reference format.
strengths: Clear three-panel sequence with distinct actions
fixes: Add explicit per-panel camera angles to match reference style
